---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://instagram.com/prabhav.shetty
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/prabhavshetty
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/perbaw

---

About this blog
